param.name: distance
param.comment: Distance from gate (sphere radius). Default 10km — keeps the inner-ring slots (~5km perpendicular from highway axis) clear of the busy gate-traffic envelope so ships actually become static at slot instead of fighting collision avoidance forever. Drop to 3-6km for tight rings if you want closer-quarters blockades.

param.name: pursuetargets
param.comment: Pursue hostiles beyond the blockade ring.

param.name: attackonsight
param.comment: Attack hostiles on sight (vs. only when attacked).

param.name: lookaway
param.comment: Face away from the gate (sector-side blockade) instead of toward it.

param.name: formationsize
param.comment: Total ships in formation. 0 = auto-detect from fleet.

param.name: slotindex
param.comment: This ship's slot in the formation. -1 = auto-detect.

param.name: slotpos
param.comment: Computed slot position in $targetsector. Set in init; exposed via <location> so the map can render the per-ship destination.

param.name: objectstoignore
param.comment: List of objects to be ignored

debug_text.text: 'blockade target gate %s no longer valid; finishing.'.[@$target.knownname]

do_if.value: (not $target or not $target.exists or not $target.isclass.gate) and this.ship.sector

(not $target) and $LocAutoG.exists and $LocAutoG.destination.exists and @$LocAutoG.destination.sector.owner and ($LocAutoG.destination.sector.owner != this.assignedcontrolled.owner) and this.assignedcontrolled.owner.mayattack.{$LocAutoG.destination.sector.owner} and (this.assignedcontrolled.owner.relationto.{$LocAutoG.destination.sector.owner} le -0.25)

debug_text.text: 'Blockade: %s — no valid target gate in %s, will idle.'.[this.ship.knownname, @this.ship.sector.knownname]

do_if.value: not $abort? and ($LocOtherShip != this.assignedcontrolled) and ($LocOtherShip.owner != this.assignedcontrolled.owner) and (@$LocOtherShip.order.id == 'Blockade') and ($LocOtherShip.distanceto.{$target} lt 25km)

debug_text.text: 'Blockade: target gate has no sector. Aborting.'

'Blockade: gate %s, slot %s/%s (size=%sm, effd=%sm, arrivaltol=%sm), theta=%sdeg phi=%sdeg, pos=%s'.[$target.knownname, $resolvedslot, $resolvedsize, this.ship.size, $effdistance, $arrivaltol, $theta / 1deg, $phi / 1deg, $slotpos]
'Blockade: leader weapons set, %s weapons captured (%s switched to attackenemies).'.[$LocAllWeapons.count, $weaponmodebackup.keys.count]
'Blockade: %s — move.generic failed to reach slot, finishing.'.[this.ship.knownname]
'Blockade: leader %s parked %sm from slotpos (exittol=%sm, drift trigger at %sm).'.[this.ship.knownname, ($slotdistarrived)i, ($exittol)i, ($slotdistarrived + $exittol)i]

do_if.value: not @$target.destination.exists or not @$target.destination.sector.owner or ($target.destination.sector.owner == this.assignedcontrolled.owner) or ((not this.assignedcontrolled.isplayerowned) and (not this.assignedcontrolled.owner.mayattack.{$target.destination.sector.owner}))

debug_text.text: 'Blockade: %s — target no longer hostile, finishing (dest=%s, dest.owner=%s).'.[$target.knownname, @$target.destination, @$target.destination.sector.owner]

'Blockade: %s — engaging: %s target(s) in area, sub %s gets Attack on %s [%s] (dist to gate %sm).'.[this.ship.knownname, $LocTargets.count, $LocSub.knownname, $LocPrimary.knownname, @$LocPrimary.owner.knownname, ($LocPrimary.distanceto.{$target})i]
'Blockade: %s — area clear, recalling sub %s to formation.'.[this.ship.knownname, $LocSub.knownname]
